description_long: This object is a cylindrical candle with a smooth, slightly tapered body and a rounded top surface. The candle is a deep, muted purple color, giving it a modern and elegant appearance suitable for urban decorative use. The surface is uniform and free of visible ornamentation, wax drips, or textural details, suggesting it is either new or unused. There is no visible wick or flame, and the top appears solid and unbroken. The candle does not appear to be housed in any holder or container, standing freely on its own base. Its size and finish make it ideal for placement on tables, ledges, or other flat surfaces in urban environments.
description: A smooth, deep purple cylindrical candle with a rounded top and no visible wick or holder, ideal for modern urban decor.
description_view_0: Front view shows a smooth, slightly tapered purple cylinder with a rounded top and no visible wick or holder.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same smooth, uniform purple surface and rounded top, consistent with the front.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to the previous, showing the candle's even taper and lack of surface details.
description_view_3: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same smooth, rounded top and unadorned purple body.
